title: DDS COVID Telework Source-Record Manifest
description: Machine-readable manifest for the DDS COVID telework and climate-survey source chain. Lists public records, local source artifact paths where successfully stored, SHA-256 hashes for stored PDFs, download-block status for inaccessible publisher pages, and which data points each record supports.
geographic_coverage: Massachusetts DDS focus; SSA national/DDS context; MRC/MassAbility context

source.title: Source-record manifest assembled from public URLs, downloaded PDFs, and MassAbility PRR targets

update_cadence: As needed; update when blocked public records are browser-saved or MassAbility produces responsive records.
notes: This manifest is a provenance/control artifact, not an original government record. It records full local PDF captures for two source records and explicit blocked-download status for three public records that still need browser-save/manual capture if full local copies are required.
